productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Brown Top
description: Composition Brown round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long raglan sleeves with a mid-button flap and embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get fashionably comfortable with this T-shirt from united colors of benetton. The fabric falls neatly around your torso enhancing your feminine style, while you could fold the sleeves and button them when the weather changes. Pair this with jeans and sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8"and chest 33"
